stemHtml: An aircraft is climbing to FL300 in ISA conditions with a constant Mach of 0.60. At the initiation of the climb, the aircraft instruments indicate a TAS of 365 kt and a CAS of 264 kt. While climbing, the pilot checks again the speeds after some time. What will be the indications?

options.a: TAS at 356 kt and CAS at 286 kt.
options.b: TAS at 371 kt and CAS at 286 kt.
options.c: TAS at 371 kt and CAS at 233 kt.
options.d: TAS at 356 kt and CAS at 233 kt.
